title: Pixel Cursors-Dark mode
body:
![Pixel Cursor Dark showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06713bf9863d7c07bad1d8b9bfc4554c862c8650.png)

Do you enjoy customizing your Minecraft cursor, but can't find anything to suit your sensitive eyes? Look no further, as this pack turns [Refri](https://modrinth.com/user/Refri)'s Pixel Cursors to dark mode!

This pack requires [Minecraft Cursor](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor) to work, so make sure to download it before using this pack! It's configurable using [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) as well.

Scaled for 1920x1080 screen at 3x GUI scale.
Enjoy!
